etymology.description: Depicts palm lines representing five fingers
etymology.interpretation: The character 五 depicts the palm lines seen when spreading out five fingers, providing a visual representation for the number five.

examples.chinese: 他每周工作五天(他每週工作五天)。
examples.pinyin: Tā měi zhōu gōngzuò wǔ tiān.
examples.english: He works five days a week.

examples.chinese: 我有五只猫(我有五隻貓)。
